mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tutor_application ( sender_uid, receiver_uid, sender_role, receiver_role, context_type, context_id, content, client_request_id, status, chat_access_status, room_id, decided_at, receiver_read, receiver_read_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{senderUid}, #{receiverUid}, #{senderRole}, #{receiverRole}, #{contextType}, #{contextId}, #{content}, #{clientRequestId}, #{status}, #{chatAccessStatus}, #{roomId}, #{decidedAt}, #{receiverRead}, #{receiverReadTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_uid, receiver_uid, sender_role, receiver_role, context_type, context_id, content, client_request_id, status, chat_access_status, room_id, decided_at, receiver_read, receiver_read_time, create_time, update_time FROM tutor_application WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, sender_uid, receiver_uid, sender_role, receiver_role, context_type, context_id, content, client_request_id, status, chat_access_status, room_id, decided_at, receiver_read, receiver_read_time, create_time, update_time FROM tutor_application WHERE sender_uid = #{senderUid} AND client_request_id = #{clientRequestId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tutor_application WHERE receiver_uid = #{receiverUid} AND receiver_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tutor_application SET receiver_read = 1, receiver_read_time = #{readTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND receiver_uid = #{receiverUid} AND receiver_read = 0

UPDATE tutor_application SET status = #{status}, chat_access_status = #{chatAccessStatus}, decided_at = #{decidedAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND receiver_uid = #{receiverUid} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE tutor_application SET chat_access_status = #{chatAccessStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_uid, receiver_uid, sender_role, receiver_role, context_type, context_id, content, client_request_id, status, chat_access_status, room_id, decided_at, receiver_read, receiver_read_time, create_time, update_time FROM tutor_application WHERE status = 'ACCEPTED' AND ( (sender_uid = #{uidA} AND receiver_uid = #{uidB}) OR (sender_uid = #{uidB} AND receiver_uid = #{uidA}) ) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, sender_uid, receiver_uid, sender_role, receiver_role, context_type, context_id, content, client_request_id, status, chat_access_status, room_id, decided_at, receiver_read, receiver_read_time, create_time, update_time FROM tutor_application WHERE sender_uid = #{senderUid} AND receiver_uid = #{receiverUid} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tutor_application SET room_id = #{roomId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND (room_id IS NULL OR room_id = 0)
